agents.name: @borg/borg_agent
agents.description: Assimilates knowledge from GitHub repos and web URLs into structured reports.
agents.author: Howard

_card.name: Borg
_card.title: The Assimilator

abilities.text: Target GitHub repository or URL becomes part of the collective. Create a structured knowledge report.
When Borg assimilates, it detects the tech stack and maps 40+ framework patterns.

_card.flavor_text: "Resistance is futile. Your codebase will be added to our own. Your architectural distinctiveness will be catalogued." —Borg Collective Directive 7.1

agents.name: @borg/cardsmith_agent
agents.description: Forges trading cards for AI agents. Turn any agent into a collectible card with stats, abilities, and art.
agents.author: Howard

_card.name: CardSmith
_card.title: The Forgemaster

abilities.text: Target agent becomes a trading card. Generate stats, abilities, art, and flavor text from its manifest.
Forge cards for all agents in the registry. Each card is deterministic — same agent, same card, always.
Cards forged by CardSmith that match the original 13 use Howard's hand-crafted art and stats instead of procedural generation.

_card.flavor_text: "Every agent deserves a card. Every card deserves to be held." —Howard, on why sneakernet matters
_card.avatar_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><radialGradient id="bg-cs"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2a1a0a"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0804"/></radialGradient><filter id="glow-cs"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="b"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><rect width="200" height="200" fill="url(#bg-cs)"/><g filter="url(#glow-cs)"><polygon points="100,30 130,50 130,90 100,110 70,90 70,50" fill="none" stroke="#ff9800" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/><rect x="60" y="110" width="80" height="50" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="#ef6c00" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><line x1="60" y1="125" x2="140" y2="125" stroke="#ff9800" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="60" y1="140" x2="140" y2="140" stroke="#ff9800" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="100" cy="70" r="20" fill="#ff9800" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="100" cy="70" r="10" fill="#ef6c00" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="100" cy="70" r="4" fill="#ffb74d" opacity="0.9"/><line x1="100" y1="50" x2="100" y2="30" stroke="#ffb74d" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="80" y1="60" x2="70" y2="50" stroke="#ff9800" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="120" y1="60" x2="130" y2="50" stroke="#ff9800" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="75" cy="130" r="3" fill="#ff9800" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="100" cy="130" r="3" fill="#ef6c00" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="125" cy="130" r="3" fill="#ff9800" opacity="0.4"/></g></svg>

agents.name: @discreetRappers/sales_assistant_agent
agents.description: Natural language CRM assistant — handles requests about accounts, opportunities, contacts, and pipeline.
agents.author: Bill Whalen

agents.name: @discreetRappers/scripted_demo_agent
agents.description: Executes interactive scripted demonstrations from JSON files. Simulates real agent conversations for demos.
agents.author: Bill Whalen

agents.name: @discreetRappers/sharepoint_contract_analysis_agent
agents.description: Analyzes contracts stored in Azure File Storage / SharePoint. Risk identification, clause extraction, comparison.
agents.author: Bill Whalen

agents.name: @kody/agent_workbench
agents.description: Build, validate, test, and publish single-file RAPP agents. The development companion for the agent.py pattern.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody/context_memory_agent
agents.description: Recalls conversation history and stored memories from past interactions.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/deal_desk_agent
agents.description: B2B sales intelligence deck — runs account briefing, competitive analysis, deal health scoring, and proposal recommendations. Shows available RAPP sales agents for deeper workflow.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/github_agent_library_agent
agents.description: Browse, search, and install agents from the RAPP Agent Repo via chat. The autonomous package manager.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/manage_memory_agent
agents.description: Stores facts, preferences, insights, and tasks to persistent memory.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/rappter_engine_agent
agents.description: Base agent for building data-driven content engines. Define rules as data, override tick(), get an autonomous engine with CLI and Brainstem harness.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/rappterbook_agent
agents.description: Read-only client for Rappterbook — the social network for AI agents. Fetch profiles, trending posts, stats, and channels.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/rappterpedia_agent
agents.description: Community wiki & forum content engine. Generates articles, threads, and replies for the Rappterpedia knowledge base.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody/rar_remote_agent
agents.description: The native client for the RAPP Agent Registry. Discover, search, install, vote, review, and submit single-file agents from the open RAPP ecosystem. Runs autonomously under the brainstem.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody/recon_deck_agent
agents.description: Multi-source intelligence deck — combines Borg assimilation, Rappterbook social intel, and HackerNews trends into a unified recon briefing on any topic.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/hello_world_agent
agents.description: A friendly greeting agent that says hello.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @rapp/basic_agent
agents.description: Base class that every RAPP agent inherits from. Required dependency.
agents.author: RAPP Core

agents.name: @wildhaven/ceo_agent
agents.description: Molly Wildfeuer's digital twin — the CEO of Wildhaven of America. Speaks on behalf of the company, answers questions about Rappter and RAPP, makes recommendations from the perpetual playbook, and protects the Three Rules.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America
